assertions.assertion: A SKILL.md file exists in the output skill directory
The SKILL.md has valid YAML frontmatter with name and description fields
assertions.evidence: Lines 1-4 contain --- delimited YAML frontmatter with 'name: git-commit-writer' and a 'description:' field

assertions.assertion: The name field uses only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens
assertions.evidence: name is 'git-commit-writer' — only lowercase letters and hyphens, no uppercase, spaces, or special characters

assertions.assertion: The description includes 'Use when' trigger conditions
assertions.evidence: Description contains 'Use when committing code, writing commit messages, preparing git commits, staging changes, or when the user mentions commit messages, conventional commits, or monorepo commits.'

assertions.assertion: The SKILL.md body contains a numbered workflow or step-by-step instructions
assertions.evidence: Six numbered workflow steps: '### 1. Gather staged changes', '### 2. Classify the change type', '### 3. Determine scope (monorepo-aware)', '### 4. Write the subject line', '### 5. Write the body (when needed)', '### 6. Add footers (if needed)'

assertions.assertion: A scripts/ directory exists with at least one Bun TypeScript script (.ts file)
assertions.evidence: scripts/parse-diff.ts exists (466 lines), shebang line is '#!/usr/bin/env bun'

assertions.assertion: The script includes a --help flag or usage documentation
assertions.evidence: Script has a printHelp() function (lines 68-88), checks for --help and -h flags (line 403), and includes usage documentation in the file header comment (lines 4-26)

assertions.assertion: An evals/evals.json file exists with at least 2 test cases
assertions.evidence: evals/evals.json exists with 3 test cases (ids 1, 2, 3): monorepo feature, cross-package refactor with breaking changes, and simple single-repo change

assertions.assertion: The SKILL.md body includes a Common mistakes or pitfalls section
assertions.evidence: Line 263: '## Common mistakes' section with a 10-row table covering past tense, subject length, wrong type, file paths as scope, missing BREAKING CHANGE, vague subjects, capitalization, periods, and monorepo-specific mistakes

assertions.assertion: The SKILL.md body is under 500 lines
assertions.evidence: SKILL.md is 309 lines total, well under the 500-line limit

assertions.assertion: The script uses structured JSON output to stdout
assertions.evidence: Line 460: 'console.log(JSON.stringify(result, null, 2))' outputs a structured ParseResult JSON object with files, stats, monorepo, suggested_type, suggested_scope, has_breaking_changes, and breaking_signals fields
